title: [security] EDHOC transcript/KDF bug in lichen-oscore
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:248-302 (edhoc_kdf) references undefined `th` var and has inconsistent context param vs callsites (edhoc.rs:259,262-268,311,638,714,731,748). Breaks HKDF info, PRK, OSCORE contexts and transcript binding per RFC 9528. Matches Python oracle failure. P0.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks project-LICHEN-uk36.2, .3, .4 (KDF fix, callsites+transcript, test alignment)
